steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The student wants to begin a narrative about one of the athletes. A narrative opening sets a scene with a moment in time — not a stat dump or a comparison.

steps.title: Match to the choice
steps.content:
(B) opens with a vivid scene: Martin putting on his Patriots uniform for his first NFL game, kicking off what would become a legendary career. That's classic narrative framing.

(A) and (C) compare both athletes (not a single-athlete focus). (D) is biographical summary, not a narrative scene.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
